# startOffset

**Instance Property**

The start offset of the range in bytes.

## Declaration

```swift
var startOffset: off_t { get }
```

## Discussion

Ensure this value is a multiple of the corresponding resource’s [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSBlockDeviceResource/blockSize].

## Accessing range properties

- **segmentLength**: The segment length in bytes.
- **segmentCount**: The number of segments in the range.

items.description: The number of segments in the range.
